steps.title: Use custom regression
steps.content: For infinitely many solutions, both sides must be identical for every $x$. In Desmos, enter $x_1=[0,1]$ and then type $\frac{12x_1+28}{4}-\frac{s}{13}\sim r(x_1-8)$. Desmos solves the constants at once and returns $r=3$ and $s=403$.

steps.title: Confirm by matching coefficients
steps.content: Simplify the left side: $$\frac{12x+28}{4}-\frac{s}{13}=3x+7-\frac{s}{13}.$$ The right side is $rx-8r$. Matching the $x$-coefficients gives $r=3$.

steps.title: Match constants and finish
steps.content: Now match constants: $$7-\frac{s}{13}=-8(3)=-24$$ $$-\frac{s}{13}=-31$$ $$s=403$$ Substitution checks the identity: $3x+7-31=3x-24$ and $3(x-8)=3x-24$. The answer is 403.
